_comment: Repeat counts per folder. Images in high-weight folders are duplicated N times in the zip so the trainer sees them more often. 1 = normal weight. 0 = excluded from export.
_v5_thesis: Mouth as hero aesthetic (6x), forelimb as competitive differentiator vs MJ (4x), eye signature detail (3x). Skeletal + living_analog from v4 excluded — didn't transfer to photorealistic output per v4 eval. v4 LOST to baseline 7-1-2 on the strict rubric; v5 is a deliberate architecture shift, not an incremental change.
_roadmap: v5–v7: mouth/eye/integument lock in, captions methodology converges. v8–v9: forelimb plateau likely → commission photorealistic paleoart refs ($300-500 from Emily Willoughby / RJ Palmer) if hands rubric score still < 2.0. v10–v12: hyperparameter tuning (rank 16→32, step count, LR) for polish. Target ship: v9 plausible, v12 proud. Total cost ~$50, ~25h focused work.
_scoring_note: v3 was scored under loose rubric (1=bad floor); v4+ under strict rubric (0=not viewable). Re-score v3 under strict rubric after v5 to make trajectory honest.
